The '''Battle of Shelter Base''' was a skirmish in the [[Battle of Jabiim]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It marked the beginning of a disastrous campaign for the Republic's forces, and sees the capturing of both [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha-17]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

==The battle==
For nearly [[Standard month/Legends|a month]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces under [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] assaulted the lines of [[Jabiimi]] outposts spread across the battlefront. By day twenty of the battle, they were capturing multiple defensive positions per week.This conquest of the Jabiimi posts was intended in a strategy developed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and Jabiimi in order to lure the majority of the Republic forces from [[Shelter Base]], the main operations outpost of the stationed Republic forces.
[[File:AT-ATJabiim.jpg|thumb|right|180px|First-generation AT-ATs fight in the [[Battle of Jabiim|Battle of]] [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]].]]
With their communications water-logged and being at least a day's trek from Shelter Base, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] realized that they had led themselves into a trap. Shelter Base was attacked by a swarm of [[Nimbus commando]]s and Confederacy [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Taking the base defenders by surprise, a [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|hailfire]] missile easily brought down one of the few [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] walkers stationed at the base. The explosion also spread to kill numerous [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Rallcema Bylissura]].

The assault was massive, and numerous Jedi and clones were slain. [[Alto Stratus]], the Jabiimi leader, single-handedly defeated [[Sana-Jis Ilowa]] with his [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] while she was attempting to move an [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]] that was mired in the mud with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], before moving on to wreak havoc through the Republic ranks with his forces. However, the timely arrival of Obi-Wan, Alpha-17, and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], along with their large number of men swarm into the battle, rammed the flanks and rear of the enemy division.

Stratus retreated to his main contingent after a brief encounter with Skywalker, prompting the overall retreat of the Confederacy forces. Using their remaining walker to pound the Separatist's artillery droids, the Republic easily beat back the retreating forces. An ending to the slaughter was only made when a squad of Nimbus planted charges on the forward leg of the AT-AT, sending it to the ground and creating a massive explosion.
Obi-Wan, A-17, and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Sirrus]] ([[Aubrie Wyn]]'s Master) boarded the smoking walker in an attempt to rescue the crew still trapped inside. However, the walker violently exploded, leading to the assumption that all three perished in the flames. Sirrus was killed.

==Aftermath==
Shelter Base was destroyed during the ensuing conflict, leaving the most well-fortified outpost on Jabiim for the Republic's forces as [[Cobalt Station]]. Anakin Skywalker and the [[Padawan Pack|other master-less Padawans]] regrouped and set out with the remaining forces to Cobalt. Meanwhile, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Norcuna]]'s forces were [[Battle of Choal|wiped out]] near the city of [[Choal]] leaving [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Leska]] as the highest-ranking officer on Jabiim.
